problem id: 26183eb8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) XOR SHL(6)

examples:
  00111011 -> 10100111
  10100110 -> 01010100
  10100010 -> 11010100
  00100011 -> 10100100
  01101010 -> 11001101
  00000010 -> 11000000
  10100101 -> 11110100
  10101110 -> 01010101

query: 11110110
predicted answer: 01011110
